response: Define the study objectives to ensure data collection aligns with data analysis goals. Collect data from participants to generate data that reflects the population's health status. Analyze data using statistical methods to interpret data patterns effectively. Ensure data quality by validating data entries during data collection. Use data from surveys to support data interpretation in the field setting. Monitor data trends to update data models as new information emerges. Store data securely to protect data integrity throughout the study period. Present data findings to stakeholders to inform data-driven public health decisions.
